title: Using publicly writable directories is a security sensitive operation
description: This rule checks if the application is using publicly writable directories, which can be a security risk.
message: Using publicly writable directories is a security sensitive operation.
why_is_this_an_issue: Writing to publicly writable directories can expose sensitive data and lead to unauthorized modifications.
how_to_fix: Use a directory with restricted write permissions or create a private directory for writing data.

logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if a string is equal to a specific publicly writable directory.

metadata.title: Using publicly writable directories is a security sensitive operation
